reliability_blockers: Phase 1 service-tier and provider capability contracts are missing.
Responses request bodies cannot yet prove Fast Mode because service_tier is always absent.
AgentGraph core, durable store, scheduler, and explicit worker authority are missing.
suggested_first_slice: Implement shared service-tier types, provider capability resolution, SamplerConfig effective service-tier state, and a common Responses request-extension helper with wire tests.
assumptions: Prompt-provided AGENTS instructions are the active project instructions because no tracked AGENTS.md was present.
The two pipeline output files are allowed stage artifacts; no product source was edited.
non_goals_preserved: No use of xai-codebase-graph as orchestration graph.
No automatic Fast through Ultra or Swarm.
No direct generated root Cargo.toml edit.

verification.full_tests: not run; this stage is an architecture scan and required implementation slices are absent
